# services.asusd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.asusd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.asusd.animeConfig` | `null or (submodule)` | The content of /etc/asusd/anime.ron. See <https://asus-linux.org/manual/asusctl-manual/#anime-control>. |
| `services.asusd.animeConfig.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.asusd.animeConfig.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.asusd.asusdConfig` | `null or (submodule)` | The content of /etc/asusd/asusd.ron. See <https://asus-linux.org/manual/asusctl-manual/>. |
| `services.asusd.asusdConfig.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.asusd.asusdConfig.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.asusd.auraConfigs` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | The content of /etc/asusd/aura\_<name>.ron. See <https://asus-linux.org/manual/asusctl-manual/#led-keyboard-control>. |
| `services.asusd.auraConfigs.<name>.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.asusd.auraConfigs.<name>.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.asusd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the asusd service for ASUS ROG laptops. |
| `services.asusd.fanCurvesConfig` | `null or (submodule)` | The content of /etc/asusd/fan_curves.ron. See <https://asus-linux.org/manual/asusctl-manual/#fan-curves>. |
| `services.asusd.fanCurvesConfig.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.asusd.fanCurvesConfig.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.asusd.package` | `package` | The asusctl package to use. |
| `services.asusd.profileConfig` | `null or (submodule)` | The content of /etc/asusd/profile.ron. See <https://asus-linux.org/manual/asusctl-manual/#profiles>. |
| `services.asusd.profileConfig.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.asusd.profileConfig.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
| `services.asusd.userLedModesConfig` | `null or (submodule)` | The content of /etc/asusd/asusd-user-ledmodes.ron. See <https://asus-linux.org/manual/asusctl-manual/#led-keyboard-control>. |
| `services.asusd.userLedModesConfig.source` | `null or absolute path` | Path of the source file. |
| `services.asusd.userLedModesConfig.text` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | Text of the file. |
